channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fence panel on Telegraph Path, Hill Close, 11th March
item.description:
This fence panel has fallen down repeatedly over the past few months and been propped back up. It is a danger to pedestrians, is causing obstruction to pedestrians and has caused damage to the fence of another nearby property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Hill Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Directly outside BFI 21 Stephen Street Office., 11th March
item.description:
There is a raised portion of flooring outside our offcie, next to the tree. An elderly woman slipped on this yesterday, she wasn't badly hurt but could have been. We are worried this will become a trip hazzard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Stephen Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40+ paving slabs broken on Morris Place, 11th March
item.description:
There are approximately 40+ paving slabs broken in Morris Place on the pavement beside the LIDL store.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morris Place, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 gas cylinders dumped on pavement on Raglan Rd, opposite school, adjacent to 1 Carisbrooke Rd, 11th March
item.description:
I reported this to the Bromley Council emergency number late Saturday morning (7/3/26). Officer informed me details would be passed to your contractor to resolve. Clearly you do not feel that five gas cylinders dumped on the pavement present a potential hazard to the children. Please update me urgently on action taken
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raglan Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush over hanging onto pathway, 11th March
item.description:
This alley is regularly used and you have to dodge the faeces and rubbish to get through and overhanging bushes make it more challenging. Please keep alley clear and accessible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Chesterfield Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of what looks like dog poop dumped, 11th March
item.description:
A like of what I assume is dog poo dumped in a Chesterfield close. This path is used regularly by vulnerable residents please address

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Chesterfield Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots making unven pavement. Overhanging branches blocking street lighting to highlight uneven pavement., 11th March
item.description:
There is a large tree root deforming the pavement on Cameron Road, opposite No.11 Cameron Road and alongside No.1 Stone Road. The overhanging branches (see photo) block the public street light which would alert pedestrians about the uneven pavement. When I walk up here in the evening when it is dark, I'm forced to either step into the road (on a bend) or cross the road (on a bend) to avoid tripping up on the uneven pavement which I also can' see very well due to the obstructed public street light. Please can you resolve this problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Stone Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fencing of 61 Westbere road on Minster Road, 11th March
item.description:
Overgrown hedges and ivy of 61 Westbere Road blocking pavement and growing on pavement. Causing a hazardous nuisance and eyesore.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minster Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This shows a large hole at the bottom of my drive, but the real problem maybe in the road as every time it rains a large part of this form and it looks as if the road has sunk and has been a problem for long time I need to know if this problem has occurred because of the flooding occurs every time it rains in the road, 11th March
item.description:
This pothole has only just occurred in the last few days, but the dip in the road where it floods when raining has been there for years, this area is a known place for dene holes. The house number is 153A tile kiln lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tile Kiln Lane, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I reported this last week and had a message saying it was fixed but it isn't, 11th March
item.description:
Near 54, Salisbury Road BR2 9PU going up the road away from the corner of Herbert Road. There is a green electrical sub station and rubbish is behind it and there is an alleyway further up (same side of the road) where people have dumped rubbish- I reported this and had an email saying it was fixed however, it is not so re-reporting it Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herbert Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 11th March
item.description:
Please collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9 Brondesbury villas, 11th March
item.description:
Bath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Rubbish bag dumped, 11th March
item.description:
Two bags dumped by the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Pram rubbish, 11th March

Under the green stairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Litter bins full, 11th March
item.description:
Can the bins be emptied please. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cocksure Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green Bin Food & Waste Bin, 11th March
item.description:
Not collected on 9 March 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): King George Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal abondaned vehicle, 11th March
item.description:
Parking in the estate illegally abondand vehicle taking our paid parking spaces

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Radbourne Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Abondaned for a very long time, 11th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been here for months with no valid road tax or mot using our paid parking spaces

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Radbourne Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abondaned for a very long time, 11th March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Radbourne Close, Hackney, London
